title: The Memory of One Hand
author: Barış Kısır
short_description: A disgraced neurosurgeon receiving anonymous memory fragments from an unknown sender must reconstruct the identity of a serial killer before the killer completes the pattern, only to realize each fragment is a memory the surgeon himself unknowingly erased from his own mind.
long_description: A disgraced neurosurgeon receiving anonymous memory fragments from an unknown sender must reconstruct the identity of a serial killer before the killer completes the pattern, only to realize each fragment is a memory the surgeon himself unknowingly erased from his own mind.
